base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_ghost_float — a character (playable) from 1986 castlevania. White specter — 2-frame undulating float. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: White specter — 2-frame undulating float; drifts toward Simon in wave-pattern; passes through walls. Levels 5-6
